en: My life used to be so heartbreaking and depressing. I didn't know where to find love. I had no joy, no passion, and no desire. All of this changed when I heard of the term "six seven". This phrase became more than just a saying. It became my life and helped me navigate through lifes challenges. I used to be homeless but now I live in a 3 story house with my wife marceline and our two kids william and bella. Every 12 hours on the time 6:07 we celebrate and lve in joy. I love this term and it is our life.
